iotfleethub.application.ApplicationDescr.Docs: An optional description of the web application.

iotfleethub.application.ApplicationName.Docs: The name of the web application.

iotfleethub.application.RoleArn.Docs: The ARN of the role that the web application assumes when it interacts with AWS IoT Core.  The name of the role must be in the form `FleetHub_random_string`.Pattern: `^arn:[!-~]+$`

iotfleethub.application.Tags.Docs: A set of key/value pairs that you can use to manage the web application resource.
